message:
refactor: Integrate wizer as library, fix LLVM linking, disable debug prints

Major changes:
- Remove WasmEdge dependency entirely from edgeboxc
- Integrate wizer_wamr.zig as built-in library (no external CLI)
- Fix LLVM linking: use llvm@18 with proper rpath
- Disable debug prints in ReleaseFast builds for benchmark performance

Technical details:
- build.zig: Link llvm@18 instead of llvm, add rpath for dylib
- runtime.zig: Call wizer library directly instead of external CLI
- wasm_main_static.zig: Add debug_mode flag, logPrint() no-op in Release
- polyfills/*.js: Disable [ENV], [TIMER], [node_polyfill] debug output

Performance: Debug prints were adding overhead to benchmarks

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 | Runtime | Memory |
 |:---|---:|
-| EdgeBox (AOT) | 368.0MB |
-| EdgeBox (WASM) | 390.8MB |
-| Bun | 104.7MB |
-| Node.js | 144.9MB |
-| Porffor | FAILMB |
+| EdgeBox (AOT) | 368.1MB |
+| EdgeBox (WASM) | 390.0MB |
+| Bun | 104.4MB |
+| Node.js | 144.4MB |
+| Porffor | FAIL |
